concerns.text: FR-007 and SC-006 mandate an Out-of-Distribution (OOD) test set based on *alloy class* (e.g., holding out high-entropy alloys). Task T022 implements a 'Source-Based Holdout' (by Zenodo study) instead. No task exists to implement the class-based split required by the spec.

SC-003 requires validating SHAP rankings against a 'Reference Importance Vector' derived from 5 specific review papers. Task T037 assumes this vector exists in `data/contracts/literature_vector.json` but lacks a task to perform the literature review, extraction, and vector construction mandated by Plan Phase 1.

FR-009 requires widening confidence intervals by a specific factor (marked [deferred]) when environmental variables are missing. Task T039 only mentions 'widen[ing] confidence intervals' without a task to implement the calculation logic or the required `[deferred]` annotation in output artifacts.

SC-001 requires a 'stratified random baseline (preserving class distribution)' for the permutation test. Task T024 describes generating a baseline but lacks explicit instruction to preserve the multi-label correlation structure required for the permutation test logic in T025.

SC-005 requires measuring dataset coverage against a target of '≥ 70% retention' AND '≥ 200 valid records'. Task T017 mentions the target but lacks a specific task to calculate and log the retention percentage and record count to verify these success criteria.
